transitions.label: Initialize project runtime
transitions.recovery: Retry initialization with the same project identity.

transitions.label: Select simulation route
transitions.recovery: Refresh the profile revision and select an approved route ID.

transitions.label: Check execution setup
transitions.recovery: Resolve the structured readiness blocker and rerun the check.

transitions.label: Create Mission evidence
transitions.recovery: Reuse the Mission ID and retry only missing next-action work.

transitions.label: Create discovery evidence
transitions.recovery: Retry against the same intake packet.

transitions.label: Build specification evidence
transitions.recovery: Refresh discovery evidence before rebuilding the specification.

transitions.label: Create task plan
transitions.recovery: Request a new plan revision without mutating the approved version.

transitions.label: Approve exact plan revision
transitions.recovery: Refresh the plan revision and approve the exact digest.

transitions.label: Start deterministic execution
transitions.recovery: Inspect the durable run job and retry only the failed unit.

transitions.label: Run review checks
transitions.recovery: Open the review finding and use bounded repair.

transitions.label: Record review and QA decision
transitions.recovery: Keep delivery blocked until review and QA evidence is fresh.

transitions.label: Prepare no-write delivery evidence
transitions.recovery: Inspect exact-diff blockers without target writeback.

transitions.label: Prepare no-write release evidence
transitions.recovery: Retain the no-write manifest and resolve release blockers.

transitions.label: Create learning handoff
transitions.recovery: Retry with the same run lineage.

transitions.label: Start follow-up Flow
transitions.recovery: Reuse the follow-up Mission ID without mutating the completed Flow.
